# Payam Dehkordy Portfolio

## Site
- URL: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/
- Owner: Payam Dehkordy
- Role: Staff Software QA Automation Engineer and Full Stack Developer
- Location: Yerevan, Armenia
- Contact: payam.dehkordy@gmail.com
- Primary client region: North America (United States and Canada)

## Primary Pages
- Home / Portfolio: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/
- QA Retainer Services: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/services/qa-retainer.html
- QA Health Scorecard: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/services/qa-scorecard.html
- Web Agency Services: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/services/web-agency.html

## What This Site Offers
- Portfolio of QA automation, full-stack development, and branding projects.
- QA Retainer service for startups and scaling teams.
- A free QA Health Scorecard assessment with practical recommendations.

## Expertise Areas
- QA automation strategy and framework design
- CI/CD quality gates and release readiness
- Test architecture, reliability, and regression systems
- Full-stack web development

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this profile, cite:
